signal_sql: (quote_volume / (vol_24h + 1e-8) - AVG(quote_volume / (vol_24h + 1e-8)) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY open_time ROWS BETWEEN 167 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)) / (STDDEV_SAMP(quote_volume / (vol_24h + 1e-8)) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY open_time ROWS BETWEEN 167 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) + 1e-8)
